description: Comparison-level variance budget for repeated current-source high_bot_soak_degradation runs. Use this with two or more like-for-like source-counter soak logs after each individual run passes source_counter_soak_budget.json.

commands_per_bot_sec.description: Repeated soaks should keep command throughput stable once normalized by bot count and duration.

route_commands_per_bot_sec.description: Route-steered command throughput should track overall command throughput across repeated soaks.

route_queries_per_bot_sec.description: Route-query pressure is expected to vary with item/goal churn, but large swings indicate route-cache instability.

route_refresh_ratio.description: Route refresh share should not oscillate sharply across repeated like-for-like soaks.

route_reuse_ratio.description: Route reuse share should remain broadly stable across repeated like-for-like soaks.

debug_work_units_per_bot_sec.description: Route/goal debug work proxy should not swing wildly when debug settings and bot count are unchanged.

recovery_command_uses_per_bot_sec.description: Recovery churn can vary with item fights, but repeated soaks should not alternate between clean travel and heavy stuck recovery.

bot_frame_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Bot frame CPU source counter should be repeatable enough to use as a regression signal.

route_query_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: WORR route-query CPU should remain within a broad repeated-run variance band.

route_reuse_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Route-reuse CPU is close to zero in current soaks, so an absolute delta is more stable than a relative percentage gate.

q3a_route_cpu_ms_per_bot_sec.description: Q3A route CPU should remain within a broad repeated-run variance band.

aas_inpvs_checks_per_bot_sec.description: Visibility query pressure should remain stable for the same map, bot count, and soak policy.

bsp_trace_calls_per_bot_sec.description: Static BSP trace pressure should remain stable for the same map, bot count, and soak policy.

entity_trace_clip_calls_per_bot_sec.description: Entity trace clip pressure should remain stable for the same map, bot count, and soak policy.
